comment: IndexNow key is public by design (hosted as /{key}.txt on each origin). Not a secret. Generate with: node fleet-ops/scripts/indexnow-submit.mjs --init-key
notes: Covers Bing, Yandex, Naver, Seznam, Yep via the shared endpoint.
Google does NOT support IndexNow — use Search Console + sitemaps for Google.
After --apply-keys, deploy each product so /{key}.txt is live before submit.
